allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Service -Name 'MySQL84' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Status, StartType")

hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(f.includes('.env')){console.error('BLOQUEADO: edicion de archivos .env requiere confirmacion manual');process.exit(1);}"

node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(f.includes('schema.prisma')){console.log('RECORDATORIO: schema.prisma modificado -> correr: npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:generate');}"
